content.subject: Step 1 — Repo intelligence: docs, rules, skill, agent
content.description: Deep-analyze the repo; extract architecture/conventions/CI/publish/plugin-pattern into docs/. Produce rules+guidelines+config. Create one Claude Code skill and one agent to support plugin work on this repo.

content.subject: Step 2 — Per-task TODO planning docs with gating
content.description: Create one TODO doc per implementation unit (v4 base, region fix, await fix, delete-batch IDs, queueName, no-streams error, retries, start-without-events, DLQ autocreate). Each binds relevant docs+skill, assigns an agent, and defines gating (eslint+prettier, unit tests, integration where feasible) and acceptance criteria.

content.subject: Step 3 — Define end-to-end GOAL for A, B, and required tasks
content.description: Write a GOAL doc that defines done-state for A (v4 PR) and B (re-implemented community PRs owned by us), plus close-list and credits, with measurable acceptance criteria and the path to merged/pushed PRs.

content.subject: Step 4 — Implement v4 base + correctness fixes + re-implemented features
content.description: On a feature branch: v4 logger migration across all 4 packages (shared log util), wide peers, v4 CI lane; correctness fixes #166 (region) + #249 (await create); re-implemented features #253, #211, #98, #100, #168, #183 as our own code. Add docker-free unit tests for touched logic.

content.subject: Step 5 — Gating: eslint/prettier + unit tests + integration
content.description: Run npm run eslint (lint+format) to green. Run ava unit tests (existing + new). Run integration tests where docker is feasible; document v4 license/docker gaps honestly.

content.subject: Step 6 — Adversarial multi-lens review of the diff
content.description: Workflow: review the full diff across correctness, v4/v3 compat, lint/format, test coverage, regressions, semver/peer ranges. Fix confirmed findings.

content.subject: Step 7 — Branch, push PR(s) with credits, final report
content.description: Create branch(es), push, open PR(s) on CoorpAcademy/serverless-plugins with meticulous descriptions crediting original authors. Close-list rationale for dependabot/stale PRs. Deliver final report with PR link(s).

aiTitle: Create docs folder and analyze 17 open PRs

content.text: Branch pushed. Now creating the PR with a thorough, credit-giving description:

input.content:
## What & why

Serverless Framework **v4 removed** `@serverless/utils/log` and `serverless.cli.log`. Our four
`serverless-offline-*` plugins `require` that module at load time, so they **crash on every `sls`
command under v4** (`sls package`, `sls offline`, …). This PR migrates all four to the logger that
the framework **injects as the plugin constructor's 3rd argument** (`{log}`) — which has existed
since serverless **v3.0**, so the change is **backward compatible with v3**.

While we were in here owning this code, we also re-implemented the worthwhile ideas from several
long-open community PRs as our own, tested code, and fixed a batch of latent bugs the migration
surfaced.

> Supersedes the partial v4 PR #264 (s3+sqs only): this covers **all four** plugins, keeps peers
> **wide** (no forced v14 cutover), and adds the unit tests + correctness fixes that one was missing.
> See `docs/serverless-v4-migration-review.md` and `docs/open-pr-triage.md` for the full analysis.

## Changes per package

**All four** — remove the dead `@serverless/utils/log` require; take `{log}` from the 3rd ctor arg via a
new `src/log.js` shim (full level set, console fallback); thread it into the emulator; replace
`serverless.cli.log` → `this.log.notice`. Minor version bump; peer kept `^10.0.2 || >=11`.

- **serverless-offline-s3** (7.1.0) — fix `log.warn`→`log.warning`; delete dead `_create`/`_s3Event`
  methods and the now-orphaned `s3-event-definition.js`.
- **serverless-offline-sqs** (8.1.0) — fix `this.region`→`this.options.region` so events carry the
  right `awsRegion` (**#166**, thanks @zlalvani); unique `deleteMessageBatch` entry Ids within a batch
  (**#253**, thanks @flipscholtz); `custom.serverless-offline-sqs.queueName` override (**#211**, thanks
  @mfamilia).
- **serverless-offline-kinesis** (7.1.0) — `awsRegion` fix (**#166**); replace the infinite *silent*
  handler retry with a **bounded, logged** retry (default `maximumRetryAttempts: 10`, mirrors
  dynamodb-streams) (**#100**, thanks @dolsem); `await lambda.create(...)` (**#249**, thanks @gabsong);
  fix `kinesis-event-definition` omit list (`tableName`→`streamName` copy-paste bug); now logs handler errors.
- **serverless-offline-dynamodb-streams** (7.1.0) — `awsRegion` fix (**#166**); clear
  `Table <name> does not have streams enabled` error (**#98**, thanks @dolsem); rename the
  copy-pasted `KinesisEvent` class to `DynamodbStreamsEvent`; now logs handler errors.

## Compatibility

- Works on **serverless v3 and v4** (the `{log}` 3rd arg exists in both; console fallback if absent).
- Peer ranges kept **wide** (`serverless-offline: ^10.0.2 || >=11`) — services can migrate one at a time.
- **Minor** version bumps (behavior-preserving + additive). No new runtime dependencies.

## Testing

- ✅ `npm run eslint` (lint + Prettier) clean across the repo.
- ✅ **71 new docker-free AVA unit tests** — the offline plugins previously had **zero** unit tests.
  Covers the log shim, the event mappers (with `awsRegion` regression guards for #166), the
  delete-batch Id uniqueness (#253), the non-mutating queueName override incl. arn-bearing shapes
  (#211), the kinesis omit-fix (discriminating test), and source-level call-site guards.
- ⚠️ **Not run here** (documented, follow-up): the Docker integration suite
  (`tests/serverless-plugins-integration`, needs minio/elasticmq/kinesalite/dynamodb-local) and v4
  end-to-end (`sls package`/`offline` under `serverless@4`, needs `SERVERLESS_ACCESS_KEY`). The
  recommended CI v4 matrix is described in `docs/testing-and-ci.md`.

## Tooling added

Repo docs under `docs/` (architecture, conventions, testing-and-ci, publishing-and-versioning, the
review + triage, and per-task plans), plus a `serverless-plugin-dev` skill and a
`serverless-plugin-author` agent under `.claude/` to help future work on these plugins.

## Credits

Re-implements ideas from community PRs **#166** (@zlalvani), **#253** (@flipscholtz), **#211**
(@mfamilia), **#98** & **#100** (@dolsem), **#249** (@gabsong) — thank you. 🙏

## Follow-ups (not in this PR)

- CI v4 build matrix (serverless 3 *and* 4).
- **#183** DLQ autocreate from `RedrivePolicy` and **#168** host/start — deferred until validated

toolUseResult.content:
## What & why

Serverless Framework **v4 removed** `@serverless/utils/log` and `serverless.cli.log`. Our four
`serverless-offline-*` plugins `require` that module at load time, so they **crash on every `sls`
command under v4** (`sls package`, `sls offline`, …). This PR migrates all four to the logger that
the framework **injects as the plugin constructor's 3rd argument** (`{log}`) — which has existed
since serverless **v3.0**, so the change is **backward compatible with v3**.

While we were in here owning this code, we also re-implemented the worthwhile ideas from several
long-open community PRs as our own, tested code, and fixed a batch of latent bugs the migration
surfaced.

> Supersedes the partial v4 PR #264 (s3+sqs only): this covers **all four** plugins, keeps peers
> **wide** (no forced v14 cutover), and adds the unit tests + correctness fixes that one was missing.
> See `docs/serverless-v4-migration-review.md` and `docs/open-pr-triage.md` for the full analysis.

## Changes per package

**All four** — remove the dead `@serverless/utils/log` require; take `{log}` from the 3rd ctor arg via a
new `src/log.js` shim (full level set, console fallback); thread it into the emulator; replace
`serverless.cli.log` → `this.log.notice`. Minor version bump; peer kept `^10.0.2 || >=11`.

- **serverless-offline-s3** (7.1.0) — fix `log.warn`→`log.warning`; delete dead `_create`/`_s3Event`
  methods and the now-orphaned `s3-event-definition.js`.
- **serverless-offline-sqs** (8.1.0) — fix `this.region`→`this.options.region` so events carry the
  right `awsRegion` (**#166**, thanks @zlalvani); unique `deleteMessageBatch` entry Ids within a batch
  (**#253**, thanks @flipscholtz); `custom.serverless-offline-sqs.queueName` override (**#211**, thanks
  @mfamilia).
- **serverless-offline-kinesis** (7.1.0) — `awsRegion` fix (**#166**); replace the infinite *silent*
  handler retry with a **bounded, logged** retry (default `maximumRetryAttempts: 10`, mirrors
  dynamodb-streams) (**#100**, thanks @dolsem); `await lambda.create(...)` (**#249**, thanks @gabsong);
  fix `kinesis-event-definition` omit list (`tableName`→`streamName` copy-paste bug); now logs handler errors.
- **serverless-offline-dynamodb-streams** (7.1.0) — `awsRegion` fix (**#166**); clear
  `Table <name> does not have streams enabled` error (**#98**, thanks @dolsem); rename the
  copy-pasted `KinesisEvent` class to `DynamodbStreamsEvent`; now logs handler errors.

## Compatibility

- Works on **serverless v3 and v4** (the `{log}` 3rd arg exists in both; console fallback if absent).
- Peer ranges kept **wide** (`serverless-offline: ^10.0.2 || >=11`) — services can migrate one at a time.
- **Minor** version bumps (behavior-preserving + additive). No new runtime dependencies.

## Testing

- ✅ `npm run eslint` (lint + Prettier) clean across the repo.
- ✅ **71 new docker-free AVA unit tests** — the offline plugins previously had **zero** unit tests.
  Covers the log shim, the event mappers (with `awsRegion` regression guards for #166), the
  delete-batch Id uniqueness (#253), the non-mutating queueName override incl. arn-bearing shapes
  (#211), the kinesis omit-fix (discriminating test), and source-level call-site guards.
- ⚠️ **Not run here** (documented, follow-up): the Docker integration suite
  (`tests/serverless-plugins-integration`, needs minio/elasticmq/kinesalite/dynamodb-local) and v4
  end-to-end (`sls package`/`offline` under `serverless@4`, needs `SERVERLESS_ACCESS_KEY`). The
  recommended CI v4 matrix is described in `docs/testing-and-ci.md`.

## Tooling added

Repo docs under `docs/` (architecture, conventions, testing-and-ci, publishing-and-versioning, the
review + triage, and per-task plans), plus a `serverless-plugin-dev` skill and a
`serverless-plugin-author` agent under `.claude/` to help future work on these plugins.

## Credits

Re-implements ideas from community PRs **#166** (@zlalvani), **#253** (@flipscholtz), **#211**
(@mfamilia), **#98** & **#100** (@dolsem), **#249** (@gabsong) — thank you. 🙏

## Follow-ups (not in this PR)

- CI v4 build matrix (serverless 3 *and* 4).
- **#183** DLQ autocreate from `RedrivePolicy` and **#168** host/start — deferred until validated
  against the Docker + v4 integration lane (see `docs/plans/07-deferred-and-closed-prs.md`).
- Publish (canary → stable via lerna), then bump consuming services (CLXP-103).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
</content>

content.text:
# ✅ Done — PR #265 pushed

**https://github.com/CoorpAcademy/serverless-plugins/pull/265** — `feat: Serverless Framework v4 support + plugin hardening` (+3228/−147, 46 files, 5 clean commits).

All 7 workflow steps complete. Here's the full accounting.

## What I built (your 5-step structure)

| Step | Deliverable |
|---|---|
| **1 Intelligence** | 6-agent analysis → `docs/{architecture,conventions,testing-and-ci,publishing-and-versioning}.md` + the `serverless-plugin-dev` **skill** + `serverless-plugin-author` **agent** |
| **2 Plans** | `docs/plans/` — goal + 7 per-task TODO docs (bound skill/docs, assigned agent, gating, credits) |
| **3 Goal** | `docs/plans/00-goal.md` — measurable done-state for A, B, deferred, close-list |
| **4 Implement** | WF2: 4 agents (one per package, partitioned = zero conflicts) |
| **5 Gate** | full `eslint` clean + **71 docker-free unit tests** (the offline plugins had *zero* before) |
| **6 Review** | WF3: 6 lenses → independent verification; **8 confirmed findings fixed** |
| **7 Ship** | per-concern commits with credits → pushed → PR #265 |

## A + B, owned and credited (re-implemented as our code)

- **A — v4 migration** (all 4 plugins): drop the removed `@serverless/utils/log`, take `{log}` from the 3rd constructor arg via a shared shim, replace `serverless.cli.log`. **Backward-compatible with v3**, peers kept wide, minor bumps.
- **B — community ideas**: #166 `awsRegion` (×3 packages — @zlalvani), #253 unique delete-batch Ids (@flipscholtz), #211 queueName override (@mfamilia), #98 no-streams error (@dolsem), #100 bounded+logged kinesis retry (@dolsem), #249 await create (@gabsong).
- **Free bug fixes** the migration surfaced: `log.warn`→`warning`, silent error-swallowing in kinesis/ddb, dead `s3.js` code + orphaned file, `kinesis-event-definition` omit copy-paste.

## The review earned its cost
It caught that my **#211 override was actually broken** — `SQSEventDefinition` checks `arn` before `queueName`, so the override was ignored for 4 of 5 event shapes, and a string ARN got spread into a char-indexed object. Fixed (strip `arn`, normalize input) + locked with discriminating tests. Also flagged 3 tautological tests, which I replaced with discriminating ones + source-level call-site guards.

## Honest gaps (in the PR description)
- **Not run here**: Docker integration suite + v4 e2e (need docker / `SERVERLESS_ACCESS_KEY`). CI v4 matrix recommended as follow-up.
- **Deferred** (need integration to verify safely): #183 DLQ autocreate, #168 host/start.

## 🚦 Needs your go-ahead
I did **not** close anyone's PR. Recommended **close-list** (rationale in `docs/plans/07-deferred-and-closed-prs.md`):
- **Re-implemented → close with thanks + link:** #166, #253, #211, #98, #100, #249
- **Dead/superseded → close:** #99, #117, #137
- **Dependabot (mooted by lockfile regen) → close:** #234, #240, #243, #244, #246

Say the word and I'll close them (courteous comment linking #265 + crediting each author). Want me to also open the **#183/#168 follow-up issues**?

---

- **5 commits** on `feat/serverless-v4-support`
- one sentence: migrated all four offline plugins to Serverless v4, re-implemented 6 community PRs + fixed surfaced bugs, added 71 unit tests, shipped as PR #265
- **+3228 / −147** across 46 files

```diff
packages/serverless-offline-sqs/src/sqs.js          | 51 +++--   # v4 logger + #166 + #253 + #211
packages/serverless-offline-kinesis/src/kinesis.js  | 34 +++-    # v4 logger + #166 + #100 bounded retry
packages/serverless-offline-s3/src/s3.js            | 44 +----   # v4 logger + dead-code removal
packages/serverless-offline-dynamodb-streams/src/dynamodb-streams.js | 22 ++-  # v4 + #166 + #98
packages/*/src/log.js                               | 13 ++ each # shared console-fallback shim (×4, identical)
packages/*/test/index.js                            | +763      # 71 new docker-free unit tests
packages/serverless-offline-s3/src/s3-event-definition.js | 9 -  # deleted (dead)
docs/, .claude/skills, .claude/agents               | +new      # docs, skill, agent
```

## Audio Summary for Silou

Silou, it's done and pushed — pull request 265 is open on CoorpAcademy serverless-plugins. All four plugins migrated to Serverless v4, six community PRs re-implemented as our own code with credits, seventy-one new unit tests, lint clean, and an adversarial review that actually caught a broken feature I then fixed. One thing needs your nod: I prepared a close-list for eight stale and dependabot PRs, but I won't close anyone else's PR without your go-ahead.
